attrition.description: Kindergarten entrants with observed kindergarten achievement and covariates. The endpoint is whether both grade-3 reading and math scores are observed.

focused_treatment.description: Complete grade-3 cases without kindergarten achievement in the node set. This focused specification avoids allowing an early outcome to act as a separator between randomized class assignment and grade-3 achievement.

longitudinal.description: Complete cases with kindergarten and grade-3 achievement. Kindergarten achievement is retained to study achievement persistence.

assumption_notes: The output is a PAG equivalence class, not a unique DAG; retained adjacencies are not automatically direct causal effects.
Discrete chi-square/G-square tests require adequate expected cell counts for every tested contingency table.

FCI+ paper guarantees require faithfulness and a true MAG maximum degree no larger than k=3.
